Prediction: Yes

The current visit record explicitly mentions "Pure hypercholesterolemia" as one of the diagnoses. This indicates that the patient has a diagnosed lipid disorder, which falls under the category of "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism." Given that this condition is already diagnosed, it is reasonable to predict that it will be coded again in the patient's next hospital visit, especially since it is a specific lipid disorder that requires ongoing management. The presence of hypercholesterolemia provides strong evidence for the likelihood of a future diagnosis of "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism."
